chapter_title.ar: باب الْأَمَةُ تَكُونُ تَحْتَ الْمَمْلُوكِ فَتُعْتَقُ أَوْ يُعْتَقَانِ جَمِيعاً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 125 – The slave girl who happens to be under the owned slave, so she is emancipated, or they are both emancipated together

text: ذَكَرَ أَنَّ بَرِيرَةَ مَوْلَاةَ عَائِشَةَ كَانَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ عَبْدٌ فَلَمَّا أُعْتِقَتْ قَالَ لَهَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) اخْتَارِي إِنْ شِئْتِ أَقَمْتِ مَعَ زَوْجِكِ وَ إِنْ شِئْتِ فَلَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘(He<sup>asws</sup>) mentioned that Bureyra was a slave of Ayesha and had a husband for her who was a slave. So when she was emancipated, Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said to her: ‘Choose! If you so desire to you can stay with your husband, and if your so desire to, so no’.
